title: Grimwart (Legacy Version)
description: This is an oudated version of Grimwart. Look forward for a new release soon.
body:
![Grimwart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21f784029ed677e2ab9b42fc5f5ab390eed424c6.png)

# About

**Grimwart** is a datapack which aims at breathing new life into Minecraft's survival experience by adding a touch of magic. It brings tons of new features that ties into Minecraft core survival gameplay. And as everything in life, it's best experienced with friends !


# Trailer

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dFX6ff5xd2E" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features

### Spells and Wands

You can store spells inside of wands. Casting spells is useful in a lot of different scenarios, even outside of combat. Casting spells costs **mana** that regenerates overtime.

### Trinkets

Items when equipped (by right-clicking) grants an unique passive ability. You can only equip one at a time but you can swap them depending on the situation. 

### Spectres

Little specs of light that spawn during night time. They give either XP, Spells or Trinket Boxes. The more of the moon is exposed the more spectres will spawn.

### Flying Brooms

A new method of transportation, very popular among witches and wizards.

### Item Delivery

Craft delivery boxes to send items to other players wherever they are in the world.

### Waypoints

Waypoints store experience to generate an item called a Teleporter. When the teleporter is used, it restores your exp and teleports you (and other players close by) back to the waypoint. Note : You can't use waypoints to travel between dimensions.

### Duel-O-Lanterns

Once two players place their bet inside a Duel-O-Lantern, a magic duel can start. Use spells, trinkets, invocations and any creative strategies that comes to your mind to get the advantage over your opponent. Winner takes all !

### New Advancements

The Collection and Tutorial advancement tabs will tell you everything you need to know in order to get the full Grimwart experience. So try completing them !

# Gamerules

Grimwart comes with **default recommended gamerules** automatically set when the datapack is installed. For example : `keepInventory` is set to `true` by default.
There are also custom gamerules you can use to customize your experience :

*Use the following commands to change the custom gamerules, replace* `<0/1>` *by either* `0` *for* `false` 
*or* `1` *for* `true`


```
/scoreboard players set #fastCombat world.gamerules <0/1>

> Buffs the attack speed and reduce damage of all players to emulate 1.8 combat (false by default)
```

```
/scoreboard players set #dropExpOnDeath world.gamerules <0/1>

> Players drop their experience points on death even if keepInventory is active (true by default)
```

```
/scoreboard players set #spawnSpectres world.gamerules <0/1>

> Spectres spawn during night time (true by default)
```


```
/scoreboard players set #tutorialWand world.gamerules <0/1>

> Players are given a Tutorial Wand when joining the world for the first time (true by default)
```

```
/scoreboard players set #dailyLoginReward world.gamerules <0/1>

> Give players a reward to claim each day they log in but "function world:server/day" has to be run from the server scheduler (true by default)
```

```
/scoreboard players set #infiniteMagic world.gamerules <0/1>

> Infinite mana. Wands and spellbooks don't get damaged when used (false by default)
```

```
/scoreboard players set #removeTrinketsCooldowns world.gamerules <0/1>

> Trinkets have no cooldowns (false by default)
```

```
/scoreboard players set #useTnTAsSpell world.gamerules <0/1>

> TNT doesn't affect other blocks and inflicts magic damage upon explosion (true by default)
```

```
/scoreboard players set #disableDuelOLanterns world.gamerules <0/1>

> Disables Duel-O-Lanterns (false by default)
```

# Installation

The **Datapack** and **Resourcepack** are both contained in the single download. 

1 > Extract the .zip file

2 > Follow the instructions inside of **ReadMe.txt**

# Credits

**Design, Art and Programmation :** Sunweaver
